channel.title: Travel on Tony Klausing
channel.description: Recent content in Travel on Tony Klausing

item.title: That New Car Smell: Observations from China and Taiwan
item.description: Like many Americans, I delayed visiting China for years. For starters there’s the distance. Then there’s general unusual Orientation of the prospect. When I told a friend I was going to China, he blinked, and asked, “You mean China One? The restaurant?” “No,” I said. “China. The actual one.” He laughed. “And why?” Well I had a speaking engagement in Taiwan, and I figured that if I was going on an I might as well go see the Middle Kingdom with my own two eyes while they still worked.
